disclaimer: Grant intelligence compiled from public sources — not application advice, tax advice, or a guarantee of eligibility. Verify deadlines, amounts, and requirements on the cited agency portal before applying.
policy: Public .gov and foundation-published sources only; HTTP 403/404/502 PARKED without bypass; deadlines and award figures must cite primary notice; gaps shown as NOT FOUND — never silently omitted.

wtp_anchor.groundtruth_differentiator: Vertical cited packs + explicit gaps + STD-CITE-001 audit trail — not raw search aggregation

federal.description: Primary federal grant discovery, application, and entity-registration anchors

portals.name: Grants.gov
portals.role: Federal funding opportunity search, Workspace applications, opportunity packages

portals.name: Simpler.Grants.gov
portals.role: Modernized opportunity listings; links to legacy Grants.gov detail pages

portals.name: SAM.gov
portals.role: Entity registration, Unique Entity ID (UEI), Assistance Listings

portals.name: SBIR.gov
portals.role: SBIR/STTR program hub, eligibility guides, agency solicitations index

state.description: State economic development, innovation, and sector grant portals — indexed per state pack

example_portals.name: PA DCED Programs & Funding
example_portals.role: Pennsylvania state grants, tax credits, and small-business programs

state.gap_note: Not all states publish machine-readable deadline indexes — county/municipal incentives require local pack expansion

foundations.description: Major foundation RFP portals — cited to published grant-opportunity pages and 990-PF where applicable

eligibility_categories.description: For-profit small business concerns meeting SBA size standards; includes SBIR/STTR, SBA, EDA, and agency small-business set-asides
eligibility_categories.typical_applicant: LLC, C-corp, or partnership with ≤500 employees (SBA size standard varies by NAICS)

eligibility_categories.description: 501(c)(3) and other tax-exempt organizations eligible under Grants.gov opportunity-specific criteria
eligibility_categories.typical_applicant: Registered nonprofit, public charity, community foundation

eligibility_categories.description: Universities, research institutions, and faculty-led projects (NIH, NSF, DOE, USDA NIFA, etc.)
eligibility_categories.typical_applicant: IHE, research institute, PI with institutional affiliation

eligibility_categories.description: State, county, city, special district, and federally recognized tribal governments
Rare on Grants.gov — most federal assistance is organizational; personal benefits route to USA.gov
eligibility_categories.typical_applicant: Individual researcher or artist only when opportunity explicitly allows

amount_fields.award_min: number or null — NOT FOUND if absent from source

deadline_fields.close_date: ISO-8601 date or rolling/annual pattern text
deadline_fields.refresh_priority: high if within 30 days of as_of_date

rules: Every program record has ≥1 cited_fact with full STD-CITE-001 tuple
Every deadline field cites the NOFO/solicitation or Grants.gov opportunity detail URL
Amount fields missing from source → gap with NOT FOUND, not invented
as_of_date and retrieved_date present on every pack
PARKED sources listed in parked_sources with reason
